data.name: Mansion University
data.detailed_description:
Mansion University

Mansion University is an adult-themed simulation and management game with RPG elements, where you take on the role of a manager of an elite academy for adults.

Your goal is to recruit students and teachers, manage resources, plan daily schedules, and guide each student’s development through specialized training paths in a living, dynamic world.

🎓 Manage an Elite Academy

  • Recruit adult students with different talents and learning speeds

  • Hire teachers with unique teaching statistics

  • Assign students to theoretical and practical classes

  • Plan three daily training sessions and one special night session

  • Manage budget, efficiency, and long-term growth of the university

Every decision affects student progress and the reputation of your institution.

Each student and teacher has a set of statistics that influence training results:

Student development stats:

  • Charm

  • Classical

  • Service

  • S&M

  • Motivation

  • Fatigue (affects learning speed)

Permanent stats:

  • Learning speed

  • Teaching efficiency

Balancing motivation and fatigue is key to maximizing progress.

🎭 Career Paths

Students can specialize in various adult-oriented career paths, including:

  • Service and hospitality roles

  • Dance and stage performance

  • Therapeutic and coaching professions

  • Adult entertainment industry

  • Dominant and performative roles

Your management choices shape who they become.

🌍 A Living World

  • Open environments with NPCs following daily routines.

  • Recruit new students and staff after completing personal quests.

  • Optional side activities and mini-games.

The world continues to move and evolve alongside your academy.

⭐ Grow Your Reputation

  • University level progression system

  • Higher levels unlock more students and teachers

  • Expand from a small institution into a prestigious adult academy

Mansion University focuses on strategy, progression, and management, set in a world of adult characters where planning, control, and development define success.

data.short_description: An adult-themed, third-person view simulation and management game with RPG elements, where you manage an elite academy, train adult students, and shape their careers through strategic planning and progression systems.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win 10
  • 處理器: Core i5 Quad-core 2,5Ghz ore Higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720 or higher GeForce GTX 560
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win 10
  • 處理器: Core i5 Quad-core 3Ghz ore Higher
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720 or higher GeForce GTX 760
  • 儲存空間: 20 MB 可用空間
